lines.left: Use: Inflicts 128 to 172 Fire damage in a 5 yard radius.
Use: Inflicts 85 to 115 Fire damage and stuns targets in a 5 yard radius for 2 sec.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Dispels Polymorph effects on a friendly target.  Also restores 150 to 250 health and mana.
Use: Summons an Explosive Sheep which will charge at a nearby enemy and explode for 135 to 165 damage.  Lasts for 3 min or until it explodes.
Use: Absorbs 600 frost damage.  Lasts 1 min.
Use: Transforms the target into a Leper Gnome, reducing its melee and spell damage by 40 and its movement rate by 20% for 12 sec.
Use: Inflicts 132 to 218 Fire damage and stuns targets for 3 sec in a 3 yard radius.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Creates a Compact Harvest Reaper that will fight for you for 10 min or until it is destroyed.
Use: Drops a target dummy on the ground that attracts nearby monsters to attack it. Lasts for 15 seconds or until killed.
Equip: Increases your attack and casting speed by 1%.
Use: Inflicts 149 to 201 Fire damage and stuns targets in a 5 yard radius for 3 sec.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Places the Goblin Land Mine on the ground.  It will explode for 394 to 506 fire damage the next time a hostile creature passes near it.  The mine has a duration of 1 min.
Use: Activates your Mechanical Dragonling to fight for you for 1 min.  It requires an hour to cool down before it can be used again.
Use: Gives invisibility for 10 sec.  It can only be used every 60 minutes.
Use: Blasts open difficult locked doors.
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"A marvel of gnomish engineering, this box contains a mischievous mechanical squirrel ready to assist you in your adventures."
Use: Inflicts 85 to 115 Fire damage and stuns targets in a 5 yard radius for 2 sec.  Any damage will break the effect.
Use: Attaches a permanent scope to a bow or gun that increases its damage by 1.
Use: Attaches a permanent scope to a bow or gun that increases its damage by 2.
Use: Attaches a permanent scope to a bow or gun that increases its damage by 3.
Use: Teaches you how to make a Flame Deflector.
Use: Absorbs 500 fire damage.  Lasts 1 min.
Requires Whirring Bronze Gizmo, Small Flame Sac
Use: Teaches you how to make a Discombobulator Ray.
Use: Transforms the target into a Leper Gnome, reducing its melee and spell damage by 40 and its movement rate by 20% for 12 sec.
Requires Whirring Bronze Gizmo (3), Silk Cloth (2), Jade, Bronze Tube
Use: Teaches you how to make a Craftman's Monocle.
Equip: Increases your attack and casting speed by 1%.
Use: Restores 874 health over 27 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.  If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become well fed and gain 8 Stamina and Spirit for 15 min.
Use: Restores 61 health over 18 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.
Use: Restores 243 health over 21 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.
Use: Restores 552 health over 24 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.
Use: Restores 874 health over 27 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.
Use: Restores 874 health over 27 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.
Use: Increases armor by 1000 for 1.50 min.
Use: Causes all Beasts in a 5 yard radius to run away for 10 sec.
Use: Restores 243 health over 21 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.
"It must be carried very, very carefully."
"A crude wand once wielded by a member of the Burning Blade."

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy, increasing their casting time by 40% for 10 sec.  50 charges.
Use: Restores 61 health over 18 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.  If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become well fed and gain 2 Stamina and Spirit for 15 min.
Use: Restores 294 health over 21 sec, assuming you don't bite down on a poison sac.  Must remain seated while eating.
Use: Restores 61 health over 18 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.  If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become well fed and gain 2 Stamina and Spirit for 15 min.
Use: Restores 243 health over 21 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.  If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become well fed and gain 4 Stamina and Spirit for 15 min.

Use: Restores 552 health over 24 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.  If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become well fed and gain 6 Stamina and Spirit for 15 min.
Use: Allows you to look far into the distance.

Use: Restores 552 health over 24 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.  If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become well fed and gain 6 Stamina and Spirit for 15 min.
Chance on hit: Wounds the target causing them to bleed for 80 damage over 30 sec.
Use: Makes you immune to Stun and Movement Impairing effects for the next 30 sec.   Does not remove effects already on the imbiber.
Chance on hit: Blasts a target for 45 Frost damage.
Use: Teleport to your Guild House.
Use: Allows the Imbiber to breathe water for 30 min.
Use: Increases armor by 50 for 1 hour.
Use: Restores 874 health over 27 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.  If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become well fed and gain 8 Stamina and Spirit for 15 min.
Equip: Your attacks ignore 10 of the target's armor.
Use: Attaches a chain to your weapon, making it impossible to disarm.
Use: Attaches an Iron Spike to your shield that deals damage every time you block with it.
Use: Attaches a counterweight to a two-handed sword, mace, axe, staff, or polearm, increasing attack speed by 3%.
Use: Absorbs 675 to 1125 shadow damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 975 to 1625 fire damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 1350 to 2250 frost damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 300 to 500 holy damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Use: Absorbs 1350 to 2250 nature damage.  Lasts 1 hour.
Equip: Increase the Spirit of nearby party members by 4.
Chance on hit: Blasts a target for 35 Fire damage.
Use: Teaches you how to sew a Red Linen Vest.
Requires Bolt of Linen Cloth (3), Coarse Thread, Red Dye
Use: Restores 61 health over 18 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.
Use: Restores 61 health over 18 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.

Use: Increases spell fire damage by up to 10 for 30 min.
Use: Target is cured of poisons up to level 25.
Use: Target is cured of poisons up to level 35.
Equip: Chance to strike your ranged target with a Venom Shot for 31 to 45 Nature damage.
Chance on hit: Poisons target for 7 Nature damage every 3 sec for 15 sec.
(2) Set: Increases your attack and casting speed by 1%.
(3) Set: Increases damage done by Nature spells and effects by up to 14.
(3) Set: Increases healing done by spells and effects by up to 22.
(5) Set: When your health drops below 35%, you rapidly heal 90 health over 5 sec. This effect can trigger only once every 3 min.
(6) Set: Your Cat Form seems to react to the full embrace of the Viper.
Use: Teaches you how to craft a Deviate Scale Cloak.
Requires Deviate Scale (8), Cured Light Hide, Fine Thread
Use: Teaches you how to craft Deviate Scale Gloves.
Requires Perfect Deviate Scale (2), Deviate Scale (6), Fine Thread (2)
Use: Teaches you how to craft a Deviate Scale Belt.
Requires Perfect Deviate Scale (10), Deviate Scale (10), Fine Thread (2)
Use: When applied to your fishing pole, increases Fishing by 50 for 10 min.
Use: When applied to your fishing pole, increases Fishing by 100 for 10 minutes.
Use: Your size is increased and your Strength goes up by 8 to match your new size.  Lasts 2 min.
Use: The dynamite for Non-Engineers that nearly always gets to the target!  Inflicts 51 to 69 Fire damage in a 5 yard radius.
Use: Restores 1392 health over 30 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.

Chance on hit: Poisons target for 4 Nature damage every 2 sec for 20 sec.
Chance on hit: Corrosive acid that deals 7 Nature damage every 3 sec and lowers target's armor by 50 for 30 sec.

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy which instantly inflicts 19 to 25 Nature damage.  40 charges.

Equip: Increases damage done by Fire spells and effects by up to 14.
Use: Jumper Cables will sometimes be able to shock a dead player back to life.  Cannot be used when in combat.
Use: These dangerous looking boots significantly increase your run speed for 20 sec.  They are prone to explode however, so use with caution.
Equip: Increases ranged attack speed by 10%.
Equip: Increases ranged attack speed by 10%.
Equip: 5% chance of dealing 15 to 25 Fire damage on a successful melee attack.
Equip: Improves your chance to get a critical strike with missile weapons by 1%.
Equip: Decreases your chance to parry an attack by 1%.
Equip: Increases ranged attack speed by 12%.
Equip: Increases ranged attack speed by 12%.
Equip: When struck by a melee attacker, that attacker has a 5% chance of being put to sleep for 10 sec.  Only affects enemies level 50 and below.
Equip: Increases damage done by Frost spells and effects by up to 11.
Equip: Increases your attack and casting speed by 1%.
Use: Increases run speed by 40% for 15 sec.
Use: Allows control of a mechanical target for a short time.  It may not always work and may just root the machine or make it very very angry.  Gnomish engineering at its finest.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 12.
Equip: Increases damage done by Shadow spells and effects by up to 10.
Equip: +60 Attack Power when fighting Beasts.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 9.
Chance on hit: You attack all nearby enemies for 9 sec causing weapon damage plus an additional 5 every 3 sec.
Equip: Improves your chance to get a critical strike by 1%.

Chance on hit: Blasts a target for 110 to 120 Frost damage.
Use: Place in the Uldaman map room.
Use: Attach to the Shaft of Tsol.
Use: Attach to the Gni'kiv Medallion.

Use: Gives invisibility for 10 sec.  It can only be used every 60 minutes.
Requires Gyrochronatom (4), Jade (2), Lesser Moonstone (2), Citrine (2), Fused Wiring

Equip: When struck in combat has a 3% chance to heal you for 60 to 100.
Chance on hit: Disarm target's weapon for 10 sec.
Chance on hit: Diseases a target for 50 Nature damage and an additional 180 damage over 1 min.
Chance on hit: Protects the caster with a holy shield.
Chance on hit: Decrease the armor of the target by 100 for 20 sec.  While affected, the target cannot stealth or turn invisible.
Use: Increase sharp weapon damage by 6 for 30 minutes.
Use: Increase the damage of a blunt weapon by 6 for 30 minutes.
Use: Attaches a Mithril Spike to your shield that deals damage every time you block with it.
